form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Maiden on April 11 over 300m at Taree Super Track behind Hollies Hayley beaten 5.5 lengths (18.08). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Maiden on April 11 over 300m at Taree Super Track behind Hollies Hayley beaten 5.5 lengths (18.08). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in abruptly, bumped and became unbalanced in the back straight.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 2 for the first time after finishing a 16 length eighth at Taree Super Track (18.65) in a Maiden. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 2 for the first time after finishing a 16 length eighth at Taree Super Track (18.65) in a Maiden. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Yet to break through after four starts, the most recent result a sixth (18.41) over 300m at Taree Super Track. Best form too good to ignore.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Yet to break through after four starts, the most recent result a sixth (18.41) over 300m at Taree Super Track. Best form too good to ignore.

form.formComment: She comes after a spell. Has only been in the placings once from 14 starts. Last raced when eighth over 272m at this track three-and-a-half months ago. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: She comes after a spell. Has only been in the placings once from 14 starts. Last raced when eighth over 272m at this track three-and-a-half months ago. Needs to find a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room turning on to the back straight and was checked.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 14 over 388m at Gosford behind Bigbad Esme beaten 4.5 lengths (23.35) in a Maiden. Rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 14 over 388m at Gosford behind Bigbad Esme beaten 4.5 lengths (23.35) in a Maiden. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Yet to break through after five starts, the most recent result a fourth (22.92) over 400m at Maitland. Looks the testing material.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Yet to break through after five starts, the most recent result a fourth (22.92) over 400m at Maitland. Looks the testing material.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fourth over 272m at this track, beaten 11 lengths. Will be tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fourth over 272m at this track, beaten 11 lengths. Will be tested in this company.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on April 4 over 400m at this track behind Sergeant Duker beaten 10 lengths (23.79) in a Maiden. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last on April 4 over 400m at this track behind Sergeant Duker beaten 10 lengths (23.79) in a Maiden. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on heels rounding the home turn and was checked.

form.formComment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (23.18) over 388m at Gosford. Looks a danger to the top hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (23.18) over 388m at Gosford. Looks a danger to the top hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked through the 1st turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Was crowded for room and fell here last time and given a spell since. Chance to atone but prepared to risk this line-up.
